description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual, work-ready attire, featuring a loose-fitting short-sleeve shirt, straight-cut pants, and sturdy boots. He wears a fitted cap that shades his face, and his hands are covered with gloves, suggesting readiness for manual labor or outdoor activity. The shirt appears slightly worn and textured, while the pants are practical and functional. The gloves and boots are robust, likely made for protection and durability. His posture is neutral, with arms extended outward and feet shoulder-width apart, as if prepared for action or assessment. The overall appearance is that of a working-class individual, suitable for urban or industrial environments.
description: An adult male in casual work attire with a cap, gloves, and boots, standing with arms outstretched. The figure has a rugged, practical look suitable for urban or industrial settings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face partially obscured by a cap, arms outstretched, and full details of the shirt, gloves, and boots.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the cap, the fit of the shirt and pants, and the glove and boot details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the cap, shirt, pants, and boots, with arms extended and gloves visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the head, cap, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve shirt, straight-cut pants, work gloves, fitted cap
